content_of_post_to_comment:
Husk is that blonde sarcastic guy on youtube who asks AI to count to 100 and it never can and also has like a hundred other videos poking holes in the AI "Armor". Anyone watching his videos can only conclude that this tech has been way overvaluated, he is using the elites class warfare tech back against them. YouTube is so corrupt i can see them taking his videos down soon.

I'm not affiliated with the guy at all, i think we should all be doing this its great. Studies have shown AI is 54 percent erroneous, I mean i don't remember a back and forth ive had with it that didn't result in multiple egregious errors on its part. Then even more frustrating, i know that my correction is essentially unpaid labor as it "improves its dataset". The only winning move is not to play?
